since_last: 48% of 84 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.80%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.44% · BTC -0.85% · Gold +0.44% · Nasdaq100 +1.96%. 48% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.80%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.80%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at +32.20%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +32.20%, INOD +9.65%, ARM +7.35%, TLN +7.14%, MU +6.66%. Laggards: SMR -4.89%, SOUN -4.84%, CRNC -4.16%, INTC -3.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +32.20% at $212.78
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +32.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
